expression.label: qB
expression.exp: 拖曳點 + (縮放比例, (-縮放比例), 0)

expression.label: qD
expression.exp: 拖曳點 + ((-縮放比例), 縮放比例, 0)

expression.label: qC
expression.exp: 拖曳點 + ((-縮放比例), (-縮放比例), 0)

expression.label: qA
expression.exp: 拖曳點 + (縮放比例, 縮放比例, 0)

condition.showObject: case ≟ 1 ∨ case ≟ 2 ∨ case ≟ 5 ∨ case ≟ 7 ∨ case ≟ 8 ∨ case ≟ 10

input.a2: If[tt ≤ 2.25, Rotate[Rotate[qD, π / 2, f3], ((-D3) * π / 2), g7], Rotate[Rotate[Rotate[qD, π / 2, f3], ((-π)) / 2, g7], (D4 * π / 2), g35]]
If[tt ≤ 2.25, Rotate[Rotate[QD, π / 2, f3], ((-D3) * π / 2), g7], Rotate[Rotate[Rotate[QD, π / 2, f3], ((-π)) / 2, g7], (D4 * π / 2), g35]]

ggbscript.val: SetCaption(button1, "動 畫" ) StartAnimation( t2,false) move = false SetViewDirection(vector((0,0,0),(-1,0.8,-1.6))) SetValue(O,(-0.5, -0.5, 0)) case = 1 show1 = 1 show2 = 0 show3 = 0 show4 = 0 show5 = 0 show6 = 0 show7 = 0 show8 = 0 show9 = 0 show10 = 0 show11 = 0 len=3 t2=0 tt=3-t2

condition.showObject: case ≟ 1 ∨ case ≟ 2 ∨ case ≟ 5 ∨ case ≟ 7 ∨ case ≟ 8 ∨ case ≟ 10
case ≟ 1 ∨ case ≟ 2 ∨ case ≟ 5 ∨ case ≟ 7 ∨ case ≟ 8 ∨ case ≟ 10
case ≟ 2 ∨ case ≟ 3 ∨ case ≟ 4 ∨ case ≟ 5 ∨ case ≟ 6 ∨ case ≟ 8 ∨ case ≟ 9 ∨ case ≟ 10
case ≟ 1 ∨ case ≟ 2 ∨ case ≟ 5 ∨ case ≟ 7 ∨ case ≟ 8 ∨ case ≟ 10

input.a2: If[tt ≤ 2, Rotate[Rotate[qC, π / 2, f4], ((-B2) * π / 2), g2], Rotate[Rotate[Rotate[qC, π / 2, f4], ((-π)) / 2, g2], ((-B3) * π / 2), g5]]
If[tt ≤ 2, Rotate[Rotate[qD, π / 2, f4], ((-B2) * π / 2), g2], Rotate[Rotate[Rotate[qD, π / 2, f4], ((-π)) / 2, g2], ((-B3) * π / 2), g5]]

condition.showObject: case ≟ 2 ∨ case ≟ 3 ∨ case ≟ 4 ∨ case ≟ 8 ∨ case ≟ 9 ∨ case ≟ 10
case ≟ 2 ∨ case ≟ 3 ∨ case ≟ 4 ∨ case ≟ 8 ∨ case ≟ 9 ∨ case ≟ 10
case ≟ 2 ∨ case ≟ 3 ∨ case ≟ 4 ∨ case ≟ 8 ∨ case ≟ 9 ∨ case ≟ 10
case ≟ 2 ∨ case ≟ 3 ∨ case ≟ 4 ∨ case ≟ 8 ∨ case ≟ 9 ∨ case ≟ 10

input.a2: If[tt ≤ 2, Rotate[Rotate[qC, π / 2, f4], ((-B2) * π / 2), g2], Rotate[Rotate[Rotate[qC, π / 2, f4], ((-π)) / 2, g2], ((-B3) * π / 2), g6]]
If[tt ≤ 2, Rotate[Rotate[qB, π / 2, f4], ((-B2) * π / 2), g2], Rotate[Rotate[Rotate[qB, π / 2, f4], ((-π)) / 2, g2], ((-B3) * π / 2), g6]]
If[tt ≤ 2, Rotate[Rotate[QB, π / 2, f2], ((-B2) * π / 2), g13], Rotate[Rotate[Rotate[QB, π / 2, f2], ((-π)) / 2, g13], ((-B3) * π / 2), g19]]
If[tt ≤ 2, Rotate[Rotate[QC, π / 2, f2], ((-B2) * π / 2), g13], Rotate[Rotate[Rotate[QC, π / 2, f2], ((-π)) / 2, g13], ((-B3) * π / 2), g19]]

ggbscript.val: case=1 show1 = 1 show2 = 0 show3 = 0 show4 = 0 show5 = 0 show6 = 0 show7 = 0 show8 = 0 show9 = 0 show10 = 0 show11 = 0 len=3 t2=0 tt=3-t2
case=2 show1 = 0 show2 = 1 show3 = 0 show4 = 0 show5 = 0 show6 = 0 show7 = 0 show8 = 0 show9 = 0 show10 = 0 show11 = 0 len=2 t2=0 tt=3-t2

case=4 show1 = 0 show2 = 0 show3 = 0 show4 = 1 show5 = 0 show6 = 0 show7 = 0 show8 = 0 show9 = 0 show10 = 0 show11 = 0 len=3 t2=0 tt=3-t2
case=5 show1 = 0 show2 = 0 show3 = 0 show4 = 0 show5 = 1 show6 = 0 show7 = 0 show8 = 0 show9 = 0 show10 = 0 show11 = 0 len=2 t2=0 tt=3-t2
case=6 show1 = 0 show2 = 0 show3 = 0 show4 = 0 show5 = 0 show6 = 1 show7 = 0 show8 = 0 show9 = 0 show10 = 0 show11 = 0 len=2 t2=0 tt=3-t2
case=7 show1 = 0 show2 = 0 show3 = 0 show4 = 0 show5 = 0 show6 = 0 show7 = 1 show8 = 0 show9 = 0 show10 = 0 show11 = 0 len=2 t2=0 tt=3-t2
case=8 show1 = 0 show2 = 0 show3 = 0 show4 = 0 show5 = 0 show6 = 0 show7 = 0 show8 =1 show9 = 0 show10 = 0 show11 = 0 len=3 t2=0 tt=3-t2
case=9 show1 = 0 show2 = 0 show3 = 0 show4 = 0 show5 = 0 show6 = 0 show7 = 0 show8 = 0 show9 = 1 show10 = 0 show11 = 0 len=3 t2=0 tt=3-t2
case=10 show1 = 0 show2 = 0 show3 = 0 show4 = 0 show5 = 0 show6 = 0 show7 = 0 show8 = 0 show9 = 0 show10 = 1 show11 = 0 len=3 t2=0 tt=3-t2
case=11 show1 = 0 show2 = 0 show3 = 0 show4 = 0 show5 = 0 show6 = 0 show7 = 0 show8 = 0 show9 = 0 show10 = 0 show11 = 1 len=3 t2=0 tt=3-t2

move = false SetCaption(button1, "動 畫" )
StartAnimation(t3,false ) StartAnimation(t1,false ) tt=3-t2 StartAnimation( t2,true)
move = false SetCaption(button1, "動 畫" ) SetValue(t1,t2) StartAnimation(t3,false ) StartAnimation(t2,false ) tt=3-t1 StartAnimation(t1,true )
move = !move If(move,SetCaption(button1, "停 止" ),SetCaption(button1, "動 畫" )) tt=3-t2 StartAnimation( t2,move)
